name: genome/convert
description: Convert LoRA adapters between formats. Supports: merge LoRA into full-precision model, merge + quantize to GGUF, quantize base model to GGUF, and validate converted models. Uses convert-adapter.py via Rust sentinel for process isolation.

params.name: operation
params.description: Conversion operation: 'merge-full' (LoRA → merged FP16), 'merge-and-quantize' (LoRA → merged GGUF), 'quantize-base' (HF → GGUF), 'validate' (sanity check)

params.name: adapterPath
params.description: Path to LoRA adapter directory (required for merge-full and merge-and-quantize)

params.name: baseModel
params.description: Base model name or HuggingFace ID (required for merge and quantize operations)

params.name: bits
params.description: Quantization bits: 4 or 8 (default: 4, only for quantize operations)

params.name: outputPath
params.description: Output directory. Default: sibling directory with format suffix

params.name: validate
params.description: Run validation inference after conversion (default: true)

results.name: compressionRatio
results.description: Original size / converted size (for quantize operations)

examples.description: Merge LoRA and quantize to 4-bit GGUF
